title: Magic Toy Stick
description: Adds the Magic Toy Stick to your game, a destructive weapon based off of the Magic Toy Stick from Hypixel.
body:
> Note: this weapon is extremely destructive. It is best not to use this mod in any world that contains large amounts of your builds, or use it near your creations. However, this mod can also be extremely fun to mess around with and an extremely useful tool to get rid of large amounts of land at a time easily.

Adds the Magic Toy Stick to your game, based off of the Magic Toy Stick from Hypixel. Right click it and it will fire whereever you are aiming, and destroy the blocks and mobs around it, like such:

![gif](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZXJ0c3hlYzhvc3Q1NDQzYjd0ank0NjRtNHhiNG02cDBoYjM0dTE1ciZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/3fgL9j2zSCb4LLgELx/giphy.gif)

A more thorough example of me destroying the world around me can be seen here:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wNC29C6o3OM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This weapon can be found rarely in Ancient Cities, or crafted with TNT and a stick, like such:

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0974e887ee61a45fde10d45006224c497dec9c80_0.webp)

We would highly recommend [Physics TNT](https://modrinth.com/mod/physics-tnt) to make the mod more satisfying, realistic, and overall a better experience.
